commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a boolean `strictToolMode` config/env/runtime gate for embedded tool-call name normalization, transcript replay compatibility, read-tool alias handling, dotenv blocking, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR blockers: source inspection of PR head shows strict mode being passed only to name/replay wrappers while malformed argument repair remains active, and the config schema change lacks the generated baseline diff. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is needed because the external PR lacks contributor proof, is not mergeable in the provided live context, and needs a public strictness/report contract decision before code repair can clear it.
